translations.![確認兩段影片結束時間一致，點擊左上角「完成」-> 下方「分享」 -> 選擇輸: ![Check that the two videos end at the same time, tap "Done" at the top left -> "Share" at the bottom -> choose the export destination -> complete the export](/assets/2e4429f410d6/1*rlG8lMVKmPhUqBkrvzfglA.png)
translations.![點選上方「入鏡操作影片」->「滾動到有綠色桌布的影格」-> 點擊「綠色區域」: ![Tap the top "In-frame operation video" -> "Scroll to the frame with the green wallpaper" -> Tap the "green area" -> Complete the perspective transparency](/assets/2e4429f410d6/1*r2Y1PvoSM5IVrXGoekR1zA.png)
translations.### 使用 iPhone 簡單製作「偽」透視透明手機桌布\n\n: ### Easily Create a "Fake" Perspective Transparent Phone Wallpaper Using iPhone
translations.#### 1. 將手機架設好、抓好拍攝角度\n\n: #### 1. Set up the phone stand and find the right shooting angle
translations.#### 3.將入鏡手機的桌布設為綠色底圖\n\n: #### 3. Set the wallpaper of the phone in the shot to a green background
translations.#### 4.拍攝一段入鏡手機的操作影片\n\n: #### 4. Shoot a video of the phone in the frame operating
translations.#### 5.開啟 iMovie APP 建立專案\n\n: #### 5. Open iMovie APP and Create a Project
translations.#### 6. 將播放位置移到最前\n\n: #### 6. Move the playhead to the beginning
translations.#### 7.插入入鏡手機操作影片\n\n: #### 7. Insert the video of the phone in the shot performing actions
translations.**影片時長同 2. 乾淨影片；超過也沒關係，之後再裁剪。**\n\n: **Video length should be the same as 2. Clean video; longer is fine, you can trim it later.**
translations.- [[Productivity Tools] Ditch Chrome and: - [[Productivity Tools] Ditch Chrome and Embrace the Sidekick Browser](../118e924a1477/)
translations.1. One iPhone (to use iMovie directly),:
1. One iPhone (to use iMovie directly), and a phone to appear in the shot

2. A phone or camera for filming

3. Phone stand, water bottle… or any object that can support the phone

4. [iMovie APP](https://apps.apple.com/tw/app/imovie/id377298193){:target="_blank"} (Free Download)

5. Green Background (Green Screen)
translations.1. Set up the phone responsible for film:
1. Set up the phone used for filming

2. Record a clean video (without the phone in the frame)

3. Set the wallpaper of the phone being filmed to a green screen background

4. Record another video showing the phone in use

5. Open the iMovie APP for compositing

6. Done
translations.1. You can first hide apps with green ic:
1. You can first hide apps with green icons, such as Line and Messages, to prevent mistakes (since the keying is based on green).

2. You can also use a blue background and key out the blue; other colors work too (but green/blue give the best results).

3. There are more ways to play with the same principle, waiting for you to discover!
[[Productivity Tools] Ditch Chrome and Embrace the Sidekick Browser](../118e924a1477/)
translations.[【Youtuber內幕】美劇、影集注意！揭發大眾媒體不會告訴你的荼毒真相！白天: [【Youtuber Insider】Attention TV Shows and Series Fans! Revealing the Toxic Truths Mainstream Media Won't Tell You! Working by Day, Studying by Night, Critiquing on Weekends! Unveiling the Secrets of Deception｜Anyway, I'm Free](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=0_dVHQBx-4k){:target="_blank"}
translations.[白天工作，被資本家剝削肉體；晚上又被大眾娛樂剝削心靈，依然做不到白天工作、晚上: [Working hard during the day, exploited by capitalists physically; at night, exploited spiritually by mass entertainment, still unable to achieve the ideal of working by day, studying by night, and critiquing on weekends](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=0_dVHQBx-4k){:target="_blank"}!
translations.just for fun…沒想到 iMovie 功能這麼強大！\n\n: just for fun… I didn’t expect iMovie to be this powerful!
translations.一支 iPhone（因為要直接使用 iMovie）、入鏡用手機\n: One iPhone (to use iMovie directly), and a phone for appearing in the shot
translations.一支負責拍攝的手機 or 相機\n: A phone or camera responsible for filming
translations.使用手機架拍攝的目的是由於我們希望兩部影片的角度都是統一的，否則會出現畫面位移的: The purpose of using a phone stand for filming is to ensure both videos have the same angle. Otherwise, there will be frame shifts, and the effect won’t look as good. Holding the phone by hand makes it impossible for both videos to have 100% identical viewpoints.
translations.再拍攝一段入鏡手機的操作影片\n: Shoot another video showing the phone in use
translations.可先隱藏有綠色圖標的 APP，如 Line、訊息…. 防止穿幫（因摳圖依據是綠色: You can first hide apps with green icons, such as Line and Messages, to prevent mistakes (since the keying is based on green).
translations.可直接下載此圖或從 [網路取得](https://www.google.com/: You can directly download this image or get it from the [web](https://www.google.com/search?q=green+screen&tbm=isch&ved=2ahUKEwiWl7yC16jpAhXAx4sBHWVACioQ2-cCegQIABAA&oq=green+screen&gs_lcp=CgNpbWcQAzIECCMQJzIECCMQJzICCAAyAggAMgIIADICCAAyAggAMgIIADICCAAyAggAULXwGli18BpgxPQaaABwAHgAgAE4iAE4kgEBMZgBAKABAaoBC2d3cy13aXotaW1n&sclient=img&ei=u6C3XtbNBsCPr7wP5YCp0AI&bih=945&biw=1920){:target="_blank"}
translations.同原理還有更多玩法，等你發掘！\n: There are more ways to play with the same principle, waiting for you to discover!
translations.將要入鏡的手機底圖設為綠色底圖\n: Set the background wallpaper of the phone to be filmed to a green screen background
translations.影片想要多長，乾淨的影片就拍攝多長。\n\n: Record the clean footage for as long as you want the final video to be.
translations.應用 iMovie 綠幕摳圖功能合成影片\n\n: Using iMovie’s Green Screen Effect to Composite Videos
translations.我使用兩個鰻魚罐頭跟一瓶礦泉水當作手機架（如果有立式手機架當然更好！）\n\n: I used two cans of eel and a bottle of mineral water as a phone stand (of course, a vertical phone stand is even better!)
translations.或可使用藍色底圖，改摳藍色；或其他顏色也可（但綠/藍效果最佳）\n: You can also use a blue background and key out the blue; other colors work too (but green/blue give the best results).
translations.手機架 or 水瓶…或任何可以支撐手機的物品\n: Phone stand, water bottle… or any object that can support the phone
translations.插入乾淨的影片到專案中。\n\n: Insert the clean video into the project.
translations.最近在無腦放鬆的時候， **滑到一個很常見的桌布 APP 廣告，廣告中展示了一個: Recently, while mindlessly relaxing, **I came across a common wallpaper app ad that showcased an eye-catching perspective-transparent wallpaper**; but as expected, it's impossible— even with the rear camera's real-time view, the angle can't match that perfectly!
translations.有任何問題及指教歡迎 [與我聯絡](https://www.zhgchg.li/: If you have any questions or feedback, feel free to [contact me](https://www.zhgchg.li/contact){:target="_blank"}.
translations.架好負責拍攝的手機\n: Set up the phone responsible for filming
translations.直接拍攝一段乾淨的影片（無手機入鏡）\n: Directly shoot a clean video (without the phone appearing)
translations.確認兩段影片結束時間一致，點擊左上角「完成」-> 下方「分享」 -> 選擇輸出目: Make sure the end times of both videos match, tap "Done" at the top left -> tap "Share" at the bottom -> choose the export destination -> complete the export.
translations.若沒有將乾淨的影片播放位置移至影片起始點，否則在後續插入綠幕影片時會出現「 **: If you do not move the clean video's playback position to the start, inserting the green screen video later will cause the message "**Move the playhead away from the end to add an overlay**".
translations.這 5 樣東西就能製作出透視效果！\n\n: These 5 items are all you need to create the perspective effect!
translations.選擇「入鏡的操作影片」->「…」->「綠色/藍色螢幕」（俗稱：摳圖）\n\n: Select the "In-frame operation video" -> "…" -> "Green/Blue Screen" (commonly known as: chroma key)
translations.雖然知道是特效，本來以為會非常複雜；沒想到 iPhone 內建的 iMovie: Although I knew it was a special effect, I thought it would be very complicated; I didn’t expect the iPhone’s built-in iMovie app could create it with just a few simple taps.
translations.點選上方「入鏡操作影片」->「滾動到有綠色桌布的影格」-> 點擊「綠色區域」->: Click on the top "In-frame Operation Video" -> "Scroll to the frame with the green wallpaper" -> Click the "green area" -> Complete the perspective transparency
